column1: # Splash port — Phase 5 tier-2 (full 286-page) similarity floors.
# Match policy: pdf_basename matches the PDF file basename (e.g. GeoTopo.pdf).
# Hard rule (project memory): similarity_percent must monotonically rise.
# A drop below the floor FAILS the test; raising the floor requires running
# with SPLASH_CORPUS_SNAPSHOT=1 in a follow-up commit per
# Initial values are conservative: 80.0% across all 286 pages. Run
# `SPLASH_CORPUS_SNAPSHOT=1 make splash-corpus-tier2` in the nightly job
# to promote to real measured values once Phase 5 lands.
